film.title: Ujala Hi Ujala
film.overview: Story of Anuradha who is an alcoholic

dialogues.dialogue: That's fine, Shankar. But..How will you sell ? As you're a graduate. Right? This is the problem with educated men. They think they'll get a job after getting....a certificate from college. -You're ashamed of manual work. No, Shankar. It's not so. -Forget it. I know.
dialogues.cause_raw: being educated and not willing to do manual work

dialogues.dialogue: Make him sit. I'll be there. Mr. Vikram. You..You're very shameless. You insulted me yesterday and today....you came to ask me for a job. If I had known Jamnaprasad will sent me to you I'd..The problem is that you came to me with uncle's letter.
Vikram, Anu is a big moody but she's kind hearted. Don't mind her. She told me that she's really ashamed. Come to office at 10 am and take charge. Ok. Well, best of luck.

His daughter is characterless. She's promiscuous. -Shut up! Aren't you ashamed to say that? -Ashamed? When you didn't feel shy to have affair with other men....why should I shy from saying it? Ajit, are you out of your mind? What are you saying?
I don't know all this. I swear on you. -Don't swear! You shameless girl! Ah! Great! You look like a fairy in this dress.

I failed for 3 years and so I returned. What do you plan to do now? Sir, I've thought of a plan so that you and your father..I mean my father and mother will be proud too. Do it for sure. Thank you, sir.
Come with me. Come with me to a far away land, dear. Daddy, didn't I say to you....some day you'll be proud of me. Dad, pat my back. First tell me, what did you find out?
